feature: Separate MLB manager replay and ABS challenge tracking
rule_cases: Regular-season default begins with one manager challenge per team
Postseason and All-Star selection begins with two manager challenges per team
Overturned replay retains the manager challenge
Confirmed replay consumes the manager challenge
Call-stands replay consumes the manager challenge
New manager replay is blocked when no manager challenge remains
Manager replay events do not alter ABS challenge state
ABS challenge events do not alter manager replay state
Manager replay data persists through collection, population, autosave, and migration
Manager replay information appears in summaries and exports
validation: Version 32 manager replay runtime rule tests
Version 32 replay and ABS independence tests
